title: Update default kanbus.yml template: replace deferred with backlog workflow
description: The default kanbus.yml template still uses a 'deferred' status. Update both Rust and Python defaults to use 'backlog' with the improved workflow (backlog, open/Discovery, in_progress, blocked, closed) and new transition labels.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated Rust and Python default configs to use backlog workflow instead of deferred.
